log: ══ ROUND 1 ══

→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 21/67

REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 9 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 58/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 40/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 173/178
